$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace; attributes/supports/usesContext verbatim.
TypeScript port; behaviour byte-equivalent to upstream including image-fill objectPosition styling and right-position layout branch.
Full seven-entry deprecation chain (v1…v7) ported verbatim with TypeScript signatures; migrate functions (migrateDefaultAlign, migrateCustomColors, compose) preserved.

Upstream block transforms for core/image, core/video, core/cover preserved both directions; added bidirectional core/media-text ↔ artisanpack/media-text block transforms (passing innerBlocks through).
TypeScript port; values byte-equivalent to upstream.
TypeScript port of imageFillStyles; objectPosition math byte-equivalent.

TypeScript port of the resizable media container including ToolbarEditButton + PlaceholderContainer subcomponents and the ResizableBoxContainer forwardRef wrapper. ALLOWED_MEDIA_TYPES + behaviour preserved.

TypeScript port. Replaces block-library-private imports (useToolsPanelDropdownMenuProps, ResolutionTool via unlock/blockEditorPrivateApis) with inline equivalents: a no-op dropdownMenuProps stub, and ResolutionTool omitted from the ToolsPanel. Everything else (linkDestination resolution, focal-point preview, width constraints, vertical alignment, inserter template, useEntityProp + useSelect featured-image wiring) is verbatim.
Sass $break-small token from @wordpress/base-styles/breakpoints inlined as the 600px media query; nested selectors flattened to plain CSS.
Inline SVG for the inserter (matches @wordpress/icons mediaAndText path).
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract; upstream init.js / index.php server-side wiring is intentionally absent.

knownDivergences: edit.tsx replaces the upstream `useToolsPanelDropdownMenuProps` helper (sourced from `@wordpress/block-library`'s private `utils/hooks`) with an inline no-op that returns an empty object. The ToolsPanel reset menu still works; only the optional dropdown affordance the hook adds is absent.

edit.tsx omits the per-block image-size ResolutionTool (sourced from `blockEditorPrivateApis` via the `unlock` helper). That UI is gated on private block-editor APIs not part of the package's `exports` field. Image-size selection still works via the standard image controls; only the per-block size picker is missing.
